series_metadata.series_title: MOTOR FUEL REFUND PERMIT APPLICATIONS - MF-8, MVF-31, MVF-39
series_metadata.series_description: Application for a refund permit to allow the applicant to file motor fuel refund claims.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Four years after the expiration of the calendar year in which the permit was cancelled. Then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain four years after the expiration of the calendar year in which the permit was cancelled., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
